description: Envoy is a workplace management platform for visitor management, space and desk reservations, deliveries, emergency notifications, and related office operations. It serves companies that need to manage workplace access, occupancy, and onsite workflows across locations.
summary: Envoy exposes a documented REST API at api.envoy.com and an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at mcp.envoy.com/mcp; no first-party CLI or GraphQL API was found.
